title: Project Initialization: Setup directory structure and boilerplate
description: Set up the basic FastAPI structure, Dockerfile, and requirements.

title: Database & Models: Account and Settings Persistence
description: Implement SQLAlchemy models for storing multiple Gmail accounts and their credentials.

title: Gmail API Mock: Client for testing
description: Develop a mock implementation of the Gmail API client to allow development without real credentials.

title: Gmail API Wrapper: Client with caching and rate-limiting
description: Create a wrapper for the Gmail API with support for multiple accounts, caching, and rate-limiting.

title: FastAPI Backend: API Endpoints
description: Implement API endpoints for listing accounts, mailboxes, and messages.

title: Frontend: Mailbox and Message list
description: Develop a React frontend with a two-column layout for mailboxes and messages.

title: Docker: Containerization and Deployment
description: Finalize Docker and docker-compose configurations for deployment.
